next_steps: Renal biopsy with light microscopy, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
24-hour urine collection for total protein and creatinine clearance
Comprehensive serologic workup including ANA, dsDNA, complement levels, and anti-PLA2R antibodies
Initiation of diuretics for symptomatic edema management
Anticoagulation prophylaxis due to high risk of thromboembolism in nephrotic state
Strict blood pressure control and initiation of ACE inhibitor or ARB therapy
Serum albumin and lipid panel monitoring

differential_diagnoses: Post-preeclampsia residual proteinuria vs. underlying chronic kidney disease
next_steps: Percutaneous renal biopsy with light microscopy, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Serologic evaluation for glomerulonephritis (ANA, dsDNA, complement C3/C4, anti-PLA2R antibodies, serum/urine protein electrophoresis)
Renal vein Doppler ultrasound to assess for silent renal vein thrombosis
Optimization of blood pressure with ACE inhibitor or ARB therapy
Thyroid function follow-up to address subclinical hypothyroidism
24-hour urine collection for protein and creatinine clearance quantification
Initiation of cautious diuresis and lipid-lowering therapy
